intro: Cyrtandropsis oreogiton, also known as the Himalayan Cyrtandra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Bioactive constituents of Cyrtandropsis oreogiton include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are believed to be responsible for its medicinal properties.
